rows.description: Item de solutis varijs
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on row type and empty monetary values. Gemini-flash's description 'solutis varijs' is a clearer reading from the image than gpt-5-mini's 'solutij varys'.

rows.description: Awt dinner and expences then
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (3, 11, 6). Gemini-flash's 'Awt' is a better transcription of the abbreviated first word than gpt-5-mini's 'To'.
rows.english_description: Autumn (seasonal) dinner and associated expenses.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Autumn dinner and associated expenses, amounting to £3 11s 6d.

rows.description: To Levi a Jew converted
rows.notes: The description 'To Levi a Jew converted' from gemini-flash is a clearer reading. Monetary values (1, 1, 6) are visually confirmed from the image, matching gpt-5-mini's extraction.
rows.english_description: Payment to Levi, a recent convert from Judaism.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Levi, a converted Jew, amounting to £1 1s 6d.

rows.description: For ye 3d vol. of Clarend. Hist. in large papr sent to Ld. Bp of Armagh
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (1, 5, 0). Gpt-5-mini's description 'Clarend.' and 'papr' are slightly more accurate readings, combined with gemini-flash's 'Ld.'.
rows.english_description: Purchase of the third volume of Clarendon's History in large paper, sent to the Lord Bishop of Armagh.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of the third volume of Clarendon's History in large paper, sent to the Lord Bishop of Armagh, amounting to £1 5s 0d.

rows.description: For binding ye 3d. Vol. in pastb. 10. A box to send it in &c
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (0, 2, 10). Gemini-flash's description '3d. Vol.' and 'pastb. 10.' are clearer and more accurate than gpt-5-mini's readings.
rows.english_description: Binding the third volume in pasteboard and providing a sending box.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Binding the third volume and providing a box for sending, amounting to £0 2s 10d.

rows.description: Buttery book nativ. 17d. Bapt. 18d.
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly identified that the amount columns for this row are blank and that '17d.' and '18d.' are part of the description. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted amounts for this row which visually belong to the subsequent line, and its note about clear amounts is contradicted by the image for this specific row.
rows.english_description: Buttery book charges recorded for a nativity (17d) and a baptism (18d).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Buttery book entries for a nativity (17d) and a baptism (18d); amounts noted as 17d and 18d in the buttery book.

rows.description: To Mr Wells servt. for writing out ye Library statuts for ArchBp of Armagh
rows.notes: Gemini-flash's monetary values (1, 15, 0) are visually confirmed from the image. Gpt-5-mini has incorrect amounts for this row. Descriptions are largely consistent, with gemini-flash's being slightly more accurate.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Wells's servant for transcribing the library statutes for the Archbishop of Armagh.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Wells's servant for writing out the library statutes for the Archbishop of Armagh, amounting to £1 15s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Taylor for a frame to Dr Hakewills picture
rows.notes: Gpt-5-mini's monetary values (0, 17, 6) are visually confirmed from the image. Gemini-flash has incorrect amounts for this row. Gemini-flash's description 'Taylor' is a better interpretation of the abbreviation 'Taylo^r' in the image.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Taylor for a frame for Dr Hakewill's picture.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Taylor for framing Dr Hakewill's picture, amounting to £0 17s 6d.

rows.description: To Mr recorder for a conveighance of Somerford Rry
rows.notes: Gpt-5-mini's monetary values (5, 7, 6) are visually confirmed from the image. Gemini-flash has incorrect amounts for this row. Gemini-flash's description 'conveighance...Rry' is a better transcription of the script.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Recorder for conveyancing of the Somerford rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Recorder for conveyancing the Somerford rectory, amounting to £5 7s 6d.

rows.description: To his clerk
rows.notes: Gpt-5-mini's monetary values (0, 10, 0) are visually confirmed from the image. Gemini-flash has incorrect amounts for this row. Descriptions are identical except for capitalization.
rows.english_description: Payment to the clerk of the Recorder for work related to the conveyancing.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Recorder's clerk for conveyancing work, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Surman for a Copy of Dr Hakewills picture for the Hall
rows.notes: Gemini-flash's monetary values (0, 10, 0) are visually confirmed from the image. Gpt-5-mini has incorrect amounts for this row. Gemini-flash's description 'Surman' and 'Hall' are better transcriptions.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Surman for a copy of Dr Hakewill's picture for the Hall.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Surman for a copy of Dr Hakewill's picture for the Hall, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.description: For taxes last year { To Jennings 16s } { To George 16s } allowed
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (1, 12, 0) and the presence of braced sub-items. Gemini-flash's description of the braces and internal punctuation is slightly more literal to the image.
rows.english_description: Taxes for the previous year, allowed and split between Jennings and George (16s each).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Taxes for the previous year allowed, amounting to £1 12s 0d (16s to Jennings and 16s to George).

rows.description: Taxes allowed for this year The same
rows.notes: Gpt-5-mini's transcription of 'Taxes' is visually accurate. Gemini-flash's monetary values (1, 12, 0) are visually confirmed from the image. Gpt-5-mini has amounts belonging to the subsequent row.
rows.english_description: Taxes allowed for the current year, paid as for the previous year (to Jennings and George).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Taxes allowed for this year, amounting to £1 12s 0d, paid as for last year (to Jennings and George).

rows.description: To Cosnys for fuel &c. this year
rows.notes: Gemini-flash's description and monetary values (46, 0, 0) are visually confirmed from the image. Gpt-5-mini's description 'Coques for towells' is inaccurate and its amounts belong to the subsequent row.
rows.english_description: Payment to Cosens for fuel and related supplies for the year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Cosens for fuel and related supplies for the year, amounting to £46 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Hilliard ye Glazier
rows.notes: Gemini-flash's monetary values (1, 13, 0) are visually confirmed from the image. Gpt-5-mini's amounts belong to the subsequent row. Descriptions are identical.
rows.english_description: Payment to Hilliard the glazier for glazing work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Hilliard the glazier, amounting to £1 13s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Wife for 2 Doz of napkins by Goodw. George
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (1, 5, 0). Gemini-flash's description 'Wife' is a more accurate transcription of the abbreviation. Minor preference for gemini-flash's punctuation in 'Goodw.'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Wife for two dozen napkins supplied via Goodwife George.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Wife for two dozen napkins (supplied by Goodwife George), amounting to £1 5s 0d.

rows.description: To Borton for gravell for ye Coll. garden
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and monetary values (5, 7, 0).
rows.english_description: Payment to Borton for gravel for the college garden.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Borton for gravel for the college garden, amounting to £5 7s 0d.

rows.description: To ye Same for carrying off rubbish
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and monetary values (0, 16, 9). Using gemini-flash's capitalization for 'Same'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Borton for removing rubbish from the college grounds.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Borton for carrying off rubbish, amounting to £0 16s 9d.

rows.description: To James Davy Joyner
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (5, 11, 1). Gpt-5-mini's transcription of 'Davy' is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Davyy'.
rows.english_description: Payment to James Davy, a joiner, for carpentry work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to James Davy, joiner, amounting to £5 11s 1d.

rows.description: Sum -
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on type and monetary values (84, 16, 8). Gemini-flash captures the trailing dash in the description, which is present in the image.

rows.description: To Mr Richards for search at ye Registry of Salisbury abt Somerford -
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (1, 4, 6). Gpt-5-mini's 'Richards' and 'abt' are better transcriptions. Gemini-flash correctly includes the trailing dash.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Richards for a registry search at Salisbury regarding Somerford.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Richards for a search at the Registry of Salisbury about Somerford, amounting to £1 4s 6d.

rows.description: To Mr Recorder for conveyance from Mr Hutchins to Trustees for ye College of ye parsonage of Somerford
rows.notes: Gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a single logical entry with a braced description split over two lines, providing the combined description and amount (3, 4, 6). Gemini-flash incorrectly split this into two separate rows, with an empty amount for the first part, which is structurally incorrect and was therefore dropped as an 'extra' row for that model.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Recorder for conveyancing from Mr Hutchins to the college trustees of the Somerford parsonage.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Recorder for conveyance from Mr Hutchins to the Trustees of the college of the parsonage of Somerford, amounting to £3 4s 6d.

rows.description: To his Clerk
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and monetary values (0, 10, 0). Using gemini-flash's capitalization for 'Clerk'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Recorder's clerk for work on the Somerford conveyance.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Recorder's clerk, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.description: Matts for ye outward Chapell
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (0, 10, 0). Gemini-flash's description 'Matts for ye outward Chapell' is a more accurate transcription; gpt-5-mini's 'Malt' is incorrect given the context of mats.
rows.english_description: Purchase of mats for the outer chapel.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of mats for the outer chapel, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.description: For a copy of mortmain of Brasenose Coll.
rows.notes: Gemini-flash's description 'Brasenose Coll.' (a known college name) and monetary values (0, 5, 0) are visually confirmed from the image. Gpt-5-mini's transcription of the college name ('Braynoe') and pence amount (6) are inaccurate.
rows.english_description: Payment for a copy of the mortmain (legal) record of Brasenose College.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for a copy of the mortmain of Brasenose College, amounting to £0 5s 0d.

rows.description: Addition to ye Collection for Lutterworth church by consent
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (0, 8, 6). Gemini-flash's transcription of 'Collection' and 'Lutterworth' (a known place name) is more accurate.
rows.english_description: Additional contribution to the collection for Lutterworth Church, given by consent.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Additional contribution to the collection for Lutterworth church by consent, amounting to £0 8s 6d.

rows.description: Dinnere. Xmas, New years day and 12th day.
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (11, 17, 4). Gemini-flash's transcription 'Dinnere.' and inclusion of the final period are slightly more accurate.
rows.english_description: Dinners held on Christmas Day, New Year's Day and Twelfth Day.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dinners for Christmas, New Year's Day and Twelfth Day, amounting to £11 17s 4d.

rows.description: Candles { To Cosens Ann. 6d. mich. 4s 5s 6d }
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (10, 11, 6). Gemini-flash provides a more accurate and complete transcription of the braced description, including 'Cosens' and the internal sub-amounts as written.
rows.english_description: Purchase of candles and related payments, with amounts noted to Cosens at Annunciation and Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of candles and related payments (including amounts to Cosens at the Annunciation and Michaelmas), amounting to £10 11s 6d.

rows.description: To Broadwater pro anno
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and monetary values (8, 2, 6).
rows.english_description: Annual payment to Broadwater.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment to Broadwater, amounting to £8 2s 6d.

rows.description: To Goodw. George for towelly to ye Fellows table
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (0, 8, 10). Gemini-flash's transcription of 'towelly' is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'towels'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Goodwife George for towelling for the Fellows' table.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Goodwife George for towelling for the Fellows' table, amounting to £0 8s 10d.

rows.description: For Dr. Hicks Saxon Grammar 2. Vol. by consent
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and monetary values (5, 0, 0). Gemini-flash's capitalization and punctuation are slightly more accurate.
rows.english_description: Payment for two volumes of Dr. Hicks's Saxon Grammar purchased by consent
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for two volumes of Dr. Hicks's Saxon Grammar purchased by consent, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.description: For binding ye two vol.
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and monetary values (0, 12, 0).
rows.english_description: Payment for the binding of the two volumes
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the binding of the two volumes, amounting to £0 12s 0d.

rows.description: For charges of a mortmain
rows.notes: Gpt-5-mini's monetary values (74, 15, 0) are visually confirmed from the image; gemini-flash misread shillings as 19. Descriptions are identical.
rows.english_description: Charges and fees relating to a mortmain (legal/endowment formalities)
rows.english_description_with_amount: Charges and fees relating to a mortmain (legal/endowment formalities), amounting to £74 15s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Recorder for his care and paines in procuring it
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and monetary values (5, 7, 6).
rows.english_description: Payment to the Recorder for his care and pains in procuring the matter (likely related to the mortmain)
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Recorder for his care and pains in procuring the matter, amounting to £5 7s 6d.

rows.description: To Simon Studs for work abt ye quadrangle
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (0, 12, 5). Gemini-flash's transcription of 'Studs' is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Stuck'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Simon Studs for work about the quadrangle
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Simon Studs for work about the quadrangle, amounting to £0 12s 5d.

rows.description: To Wm Day Smith for work
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (1, 10, 1). Gpt-5-mini's transcription of 'Wm Day Smith' is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Mr. Day Smith'.
rows.english_description: Payment to William Day Smith for work (likely smithing or repair work)
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to William Day Smith for work, amounting to £1 10s 1d.

rows.description: To Rich. Borton for gravell
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and monetary values (7, 4, 6).
rows.english_description: Payment to Richard Borton for supplying gravel
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Richard Borton for supplying gravel, amounting to £7 4s 6d.

rows.description: To West for Labourers to Cleans ye Sellar
rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary values (0, 3, 0). Gemini-flash's capitalization and transcription of 'Cleans ye Sellar' are slightly more accurate.
rows.english_description: Payment to West for labourers employed to clean the cellar
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to West for labourers employed to clean the cellar, amounting to £0 3s 0d.

rows.notes: Both extractors agree on the empty description and monetary values (132, 7, 2) for the final total.
